flashcards.back: Learning from labeled data to predict outputs (classification/regression).
Learning from unlabeled data to discover structure like clusters or low-dimensional representations.
An agent learns by taking actions and receiving rewards to maximize long-term return.

flashcards.front: Give one algorithm for each type of ML.
flashcards.back: Supervised: Linear Regression; Unsupervised: K-Means; Reinforcement: Q-Learning.
Balancing trying new actions vs. using the best-known action in reinforcement learning.
